english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate
Praise belongs to ALLAH,
the First before the bringing forth and the giving of life,
and the Last after the annihilation of all things,
the All-knowing who
forgets not him who remembers Him,
decreases not him who thanks Him,
disappoints not him who supplicates Him,
and cuts not off the hope of him who hopes in Him!

arabic text: أَللَّهُمَّ إنِّي أُشْهِدُكَ وَكَفى بِكَ شَهِيداً،
english translation text: O ALLAH, I call Thee to witness and Thou art sufficient witness…
...I call to witness all Thy angels,
the inhabitants of Thy heavens, the bearers of Thy Throne,
Thy prophets and Thy messengers whom Thou hast sent out,
and the various kinds of creatures Thou hast brought forth,

arabic text: أَنِّي أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللَّهُ لا إلهَ إلاَّ أَنْتَ
english translation text: that I bear witness that Thou art ALLAH; there is no god but Thou,
Thou alone, who hast no associate nor any equal,

arabic text: وَلا عَدِيلَ وَلا خُلْفَ لِقَوْلِكَ وَلا تَبْدِيْلَ
english translation text: and Thy word has no failing, nor any change;

arabic text: وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وآلِهِ عَبْدُكَ وَرَسُولُكَ،
english translation text: and that MUHAMMAD (ALLAH bless him and his Household) is Thy servant and Thy messenger;
he delivered to the servants that with which Thou charged him,

arabic text: وَجاهَدَ فِي اللَّهِ (عَزَّوَجَلَ خَ لَ) حَقَّ الْجِهادِ،
english translation text: he struggled for ALLAH as is His due,

arabic text: وَأَنَّهُ بَشَّرَ بِما هُوَ حَقٌّ مِنَ الثَّوابِ،
english translation text: he gave the good news of the truth of reward,

arabic text: وَأَنْذَرَ بِما هُوَ صِدْقٌ مِنَ الْعِقابِ.
english translation text: and he warned of the veracity of punishment.

arabic text: أَللَّهُمَّ ثَبِّتْنِي عَلى دِينِكَ ما أَحْيَيْتَنِي،
english translation text: O Allah, make me firm in Thy religion as long as Thou keepest me alive,

arabic text: وَلا تُزِغْ قَلْبِي بَعْدَ إذْ هَدَيْتَنِي،
english translation text: make not my heart to swerve after Thou hast guided me,

arabic text: وَهَبْ لِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَة إنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ،
english translation text: and give me mercy from Thee, surely Thou art the Giver.
Bless MUHAMMAD and the Household of MUHAMMAD,

arabic text: وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنْ أَتْباعِهِ وَشِيعَتِهِ وَاحْشُرْنِي فِي زُمْرَتِهِ
english translation text: make me one of his followers and his partisans, muster me in his band,
and give me the success of accomplishing the obligatory observance of Friday,

arabic text: وَما أَوْجَبْتَ عَلَيَّ فِيها مِنَ الطَّاعاتِ،
english translation text: performing the acts of obedience which Thou has made incumbent upon me within it,

arabic text: وَقَسَمْتَ لِاَهْلِها مِنَ الْعَطآءِ فِي يَوْمِ الْجَزآءِ،
english translation text: [receiving] the bestowal which Thou hast apportioned for its people on the Day of Recompense!
Surely Thou art Might wise!
